posts.author: Sammy (Samantha)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi everyone! Purple Plum Consulting is launching a 𝗻𝗲𝘄 𝘄𝗲𝗯𝗶𝗻𝗮𝗿 𝘀𝗲𝗿𝗶𝗲𝘀—𝗧𝘂𝗲𝘀𝗱𝗮𝘆𝘀 𝘄𝗶𝘁𝗵 𝗺𝗼𝗻𝗱𝗮𝘆—where we go deep into how to get the most out of monday.com for different industries.

Our first session is all about 𝗿𝗲𝘀𝗶𝗱𝗲𝗻𝘁𝗶𝗮𝗹 𝗿𝗲𝗮𝗹 𝗲𝘀𝘁𝗮𝘁𝗲—helping brokerages and teams streamline their workflows, eliminate manual tasks, and gain real-time insights to scale efficiently.

Join us for:
A step-by-step look at optimizing your real estate workflows
How to track listings from intake to closing with automation
Custom dashboards to monitor agent performance, revenue forecasts, and deal flow
Live Q&A—send your questions in advance to sam@purpleplumtech.com

Can’t make it live? No problem! Register now, and we’ll send you the recording straight to your inbox.

Register via Zoom here

Hope to see you there, and if you have questions we can cover in other webinars in this series please let me know!
